title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Frontend Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
